channel.title: Email Marketing on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Email Marketing on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Write Email Newsletters Faster for Solopreneurs
item.description: How to Write Email Newsletters Faster for Solopreneurs You’re a solopreneur or small business owner, and your inbox is a mess of half-written drafts. You know email newsletters are a killer way to connect with your audience, build trust, and drive sales—but finding the time to write them feels impossible. Between managing clients, creating content, and handling everything else on your plate, newsletters often get pushed to “someday.” Meanwhile, your competitors are sending consistent, polished emails that keep them top of mind.

item.title: How to Write Cold Emails That Get Responses as a Solopreneur
item.description: How to Write Cold Emails That Get Responses as a Solopreneur You’re a solopreneur or small business owner, and you’ve got a great service or product to offer. But here’s the problem: you send out cold emails, and… crickets. No replies, no interest, just a sinking feeling that you’re wasting your time. Cold outreach feels like shouting into the void, especially when you’re juggling everything else on your plate. I’ve been there, and I know how frustrating it is to pour effort into emails that go nowhere.
